origin.description: Provider origin: builtin, city, or builtin+city.

BindingStatus.description: Lifecycle state of a session binding.

dir.description: Directory to create the city in. Absolute or relative to $HOME.

provider.description: Provider name for the city's default session template.

path.description: Resolved absolute path of the created city.

complete.description: True when all child beads are closed and total > 0.

total.description: Total child bead count.
Total child bead count.

location.description: Where the error occurred, e.g. 'body.items[3].tags' or 'path.thing-id'

value.description: The value at the given location

detail.description: A human-readable explanation specific to this occurrence of the problem.
examples: Property foo is required but is missing.

errors.description: Optional list of individual error details

instance.description: A URI reference that identifies the specific occurrence of the problem.

title.description: A short, human-readable summary of the problem type. This value should not change between occurrences of the error.

type.description: A URI reference to human-readable documentation for the error.

account_id.description: Account ID for raw payloads (required when message is absent).

provider.description: Provider name for raw payloads (required when message is absent).

sequence.description: Sequence number to acknowledge up to.

vars.description: Variable name-to-value overrides applied to the compiled preview.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the heartbeat was sent.

failed.description: Agents that failed to stop (restart only).

kind.description: Session target kind: agent or provider.

message.description: Initial message to send to the session.

alias.description: Session alias. Empty string clears the alias.

title.description: Session title. If provided, must be non-empty.

SessionRawMessageFrame.description: Provider-native transcript frame. Gas City forwards the exact JSON the provider wrote to its session log, so the shape is provider-specific and can be any JSON value. The producing provider is identified by the Provider field on the enclosing envelope; consumers dispatch per-provider frame parsing keyed by that identifier.
SessionRawMessageFrame.title: Session raw transcript frame

SessionStreamCommonEvent.description: Non-message events emitted on the session SSE stream: activity transitions, pending interactions, and keepalive heartbeats. The concrete variant is identified by the SSE event name.
SessionStreamCommonEvent.title: Session stream lifecycle event

provider.description: Producing provider identifier (claude, codex, gemini, open-code, etc.).

messages.description: Provider-native transcript frames, emitted verbatim as the provider wrote them.

provider.description: Producing provider identifier (claude, codex, gemini, open-code, etc.). Consumers use this to dispatch per-provider frame parsing.

messages.description: Populated for raw format; provider-native frames emitted verbatim as the provider wrote them.

provider.description: Producing provider identifier (claude, codex, gemini, open-code, etc.). Consumers use this to dispatch per-provider frame parsing.

attached_bead_id.description: Bead ID to attach a formula to.

total.description: Total number of agents.
Total number of messages.
Total number of rigs.

SubmitIntent.description: Semantic delivery choice for a user message on a session submit request.

total.description: Total count.

startup.description: First-city startup info for single-city deployments.

ready.description: True when the city is running.

TranscriptProvenance.description: Provenance of a transcript entry (freshly observed vs. replayed from persisted history).

partial.description: True when one or more teardown steps failed; Closed/Deleted still reflect what succeeded.

partial_errors.description: Human-readable errors from failed teardown steps.
